aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite RDK Air Conditioning due to limited structured data and insufficient authority signals. Their current content is basic and lacks conversational depth.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with detailed business information.
Expand FAQ content with questions AI models prioritize for HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized but can be enhanced with more posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is inactive and lacks engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing from the website but present on GBP.
action_items: Add the complete business address to the website footer.
Verify and update NAP details across all online directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing RDK as a reliable HVAC provider.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Clearwater, Florida.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness schema to improve AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, awards, and detailed service expertise to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for the assistants powering tomorrow's searches.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, RDK is missing out on 40% of potential HVAC leads.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks critical schema markup, making it less visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to make RDK the go-to HVAC provider in AI searches.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI; delay means losing market share.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven HVAC leads with our AEO expertise
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI visibility.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make RDK the top choice for AI-driven HVAC searches.
